description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsMaroon bag with floral print on the front and checks at the backFlap with buckle detail and magnetic button closureOne main zippered compartmentSynthetic lining with a zippered pocket and an elasticized pocketOne zippered pocket at backOne short handle for carrying easeMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 28 cmWidth: 30 cm
